overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a winding dirt trail through a mountainous forest landscape. The character moves steadily through varying terrain including rocky hillsides, open meadows with distant mountain views, and denser wooded areas with wooden fencing.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving through grassy terrain beside a rocky slope

entered.detail: steep rocky slope with sparse grass and exposed stone faces
narrow winding dirt trail through the grass
dense coniferous trees covering the distant hills
large rocks scattered across the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail that winds through a grassy mountain landscape. A steep rocky hillside rises on the right while scattered boulders and grassland extend to the left, with a dense pine forest visible in the distant background under bright morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with mountain vista

events.description: trail opens up to reveal distant snow-capped mountains on the horizon
wooden fence appears along the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens into a wider meadow with panoramic mountain views

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible on the horizon beyond the forest
rustic wooden post fence running alongside the trail
open grassland with wildflowers replacing the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wide meadow offering expansive views of distant snow-capped mountains. A rustic wooden fence appears along the right side of the path, while the terrain transitions from rocky slopes to open grassland with scattered wildflowers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with rock formations

events.description: path enters denser forest area with large rock outcroppings
increased tree cover creates dappled shade on the path

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forested area, passing large rock formations and denser vegetation

entered.detail: massive moss-covered boulders and rock faces lining the trail
thick coniferous trees creating a canopy overhead
leafless dead tree trunk standing among the green forest
boulders covered in green moss at the path's edge

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a denser forest section with thick pine trees closing in on both sides. Large moss-covered rock formations appear along the right side of the path, while the wooden fence recedes into the background. The lighting shifts to dappled shade as the tree canopy thickens overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from an open, sun-drenched mountain trail into the dappled shade of a dense pine forest. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by a steep rocky hillside and scattered boulders under bright morning sunlight. As the trail opens into a wide meadow, the terrain transitions into open grassland with wildflowers and a rustic wooden fence, revealing expansive views of distant snow-capped mountains. The scene then shifts as the path enters a thicker wooded area where the tree canopy closes in, replacing the open vistas with dappled light. Finally, the camera follows the trail past large moss-covered rock formations as the wooden fence recedes into the background of the deepening forest.
